untranslatable_reason: Signal requires synthetic options pricing (call_price + put_price - futures_price), spread differential calculations, and explicit threshold parameters that cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. Options Greeks, volatility surfaces, and synthetic spread pricing are not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: NATENBERG_DRY_100_0 is a volatility arbitrage signal from 'Volatility Arbitrage' requiring real-time options market data (call/put prices, strike selection, synthetic pricing logic). The threshold [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] is context-dependent and must be calibrated per market conditions. This signal cannot be reliably translated to price-action-only indicators without access to options chains and implied volatility surfaces.
